commands.name: images
commands.description: Extract embedded raster images from a PDF to a directory (for vision/figures).

commands.name: ocr
commands.description: OCR scanned PDF pages (rasterize -> tesseract). Use for pages probe.py flags as

commands.name: probe
commands.description: Probe a PDF -> page count, metadata, per-page text coverage (detect scanned pages).

commands.name: tables
commands.description: Extract tables from a PDF with pdfplumber, page by page.

commands.name: text
commands.description: Extract per-page text from a PDF (layout-aware), with page locators for receipts.
